entry.title: Duterte admitted in 2018 he continued drinking despite doctor’s cancer warning

link.title: Duterte admitted in 2018 he continued drinking despite doctor’s cancer warning

entry.content:
As Presidential Spokesperson Harry Roque tried to quell alarm over President Rodrigo Duterte’s claim that his Barrett’s Esophagus was "nearing stage 1 cancer," Duterte in October 2018, admitted to enjoying liquor, brandy to be exact, before going to bed.
Read:
entry.summary: As Presidential Spokesperson Harry Roque tried to quell alarm over President Rodrigo Duterte’s claim that his Barrett’s Esophagus was "nearing stage 1 cancer," Duterte in October 2018, admitted to enjoying liquor, brandy to be exact, before going to bed. Read:

entry.title: Sharrow Propellers: Design

link.title: Sharrow Propellers: Design

entry.content: In this video, learn about the conception and design of Sharrow Propellers as Boating editors discuss the new propeller with the creator. Part Two of a three-part video series.
entry.summary: In this video, learn about the conception and design of Sharrow Propellers as Boating editors discuss the new propeller with the creator. Part Two of a three-part video series.

entry.title: Los alcaldes solicitan ayuda a la Junta ya que el virus del Nilo afecta a 12 pueblos

link.title: Los alcaldes solicitan ayuda a la Junta ya que el virus del Nilo afecta a 12 pueblos

entry.content:
Sevilla, 26 ago (EFE).- Los ayuntamientos de Coria del Río y La Puebla del Río han pedido ayuda a la Junta de Andalucía para las labores de fumigación contra los mosquitos que causan el virus del Nilo, porque afecta a doce localidades sevillanas y supera el ámbito local y sus posibilidades económicas.
El brote ha causado la muerte de dos personas y afecta a 34 personas, 16 de ellas ingresadas y seis en la UCI, y a 32 caballos, lo que supone el más extenso de los registrados en el Centro Europeo de Control Enfermedades, según ha afirmado este miércoles Rubén Bueno, doctor en Ciencias Biológicas y contratado para ayudar a controlar los mosquitos, una labor que hace en varias ciudades españolas.
Tras la petición de la Junta de que ambos pueblos asuman los costes de la fumigación, los alcaldes de Coria, Modesto González, y de La Puebla, Manuel Bejarano, han explicado en rueda de prensa que están promoviendo una recogida de firmas entre los municipios del Bajo Guadalquivir para que el consejero de Salud, Jesús Aguirre, comparezca en el Parlamento para informar de este brote.
Hasta ahora, hay casos de personas o animales afectados en La Puebla, Coria, Almensilla, Mairena del Aljarafe, Gelves, Bormujos, Camas, Dos Hermanas, Los Palacios, Sevilla, Las Cabezas y Lebrija, según la información remitida por Salud a los alcaldes.
Ambos regidores han criticado que desde la Junta de Andalucía les atribuyan a ellos las competencias para luchar contra los mosquitos alegando un decreto de 1995, que ellos consideran superado por una ley de 1997, y han subrayado que en caso de alerta sanitaria como la decretada por virus del Nilo es la administración autonómica la que debe actuar.
"La Junta debe tirar del carro" y los ayuntamientos colaborarán, como han hecho hasta ahora, ha subrayado el alcalde de La Puebla.
Ha añadido que para una correcta fumigación, la Junta es "más ágil" porque desde los ayuntamientos no pueden actuar en el Guadalquivir, lo que requiere permisos de la Confederación; en los pinares, que exige autorización de Medio Ambiente por la posible afección a las aves; y en las marismas, que necesita el beneplácito de los arroceros. EFE
IMÁGENES: CONFERENCIA DE PRENSA DE ALCALDES DE LOCALIDADES SEVILLANAS AFECTADAS POR EL MOSQUITO
DECLARACIONES: MANUEL BEJARANO, ALCALDE DE PUEBLA DEL RÍO
MODESTO GONZÁLEZ, ALCALDE DE CORIA DEL RÍO
entry.summary: Sevilla, 26 ago (EFE).- Los ayuntamientos de Coria del Río y La Puebla del Río han pedido ayuda a la Junta de Andalucía para las labores de fumigación contra los mosquitos que causan el virus del Nilo, porque afecta a doce localidades sevillanas y supera el ámbito local y sus posibilidades económicas. El brote ha causado la muerte de dos personas y afecta a 34 personas, 16 de ellas ingresadas y seis en la UCI, y a 32 caballos, lo que supone el más extenso de los registrados en el Centro Europeo de Control Enfermedades, según ha afirmado este miércoles Rubén Bueno, doctor en Ciencias Biológicas y contratado para ayudar a controlar los mosquitos, una labor que hace en varias ciudades españolas. Tras la petición de la Junta de que ambos pueblos asuman los costes de la fumigación, los alcaldes de Coria, Modesto González, y de La Puebla, Manuel Bejarano, han explicado en rueda de prensa que están promoviendo una recogida de firmas entre los municipios del Bajo Guadalquivir para que el consejero de Salud, Jesús Aguirre, comparezca en el Parlamento para informar de este brote. Hasta ahora, hay casos de personas o animales afectados en La Puebla, Coria, Almensilla, Mairena del Aljarafe, Gelves, Bormujos, Camas, Dos Hermanas, Los Palacios, Sevilla, Las Cabezas y Lebrija, según la información remitida por Salud a los alcaldes. Ambos regidores han criticado que desde la Junta de Andalucía les atribuyan a ellos las competencias para luchar contra los mosquitos alegando un decreto de 1995, que ellos consideran superado por una ley de 1997, y han subrayado que en caso de alerta sanitaria como la decretada por virus del Nilo es la administración autonómica la que debe actuar. "La Junta debe tirar del carro" y los ayuntamientos colaborarán, como han hecho hasta ahora, ha subrayado el alcalde de La Puebla. Ha añadido que para una correcta fumigación, la Junta es "más ágil" porque desde los ayuntamientos no pueden actuar en el Guadalquivir, lo que requiere permisos de la Confederación; en los pinares, que exige autorización de Medio Ambiente por la posible afección a las aves; y en las marismas, que necesita el beneplácito de los arroceros. EFE IMÁGENES: CONFERENCIA DE PRENSA DE ALCALDES DE LOCALIDADES SEVILLANAS AFECTADAS POR EL MOSQUITO DECLARACIONES: MANUEL BEJARANO, ALCALDE DE PUEBLA DEL RÍO MODESTO GONZÁLEZ, ALCALDE DE CORIA DEL RÍO

entry.title: Guardiola está en Barcelona para reunirse con Messi

entry.content: El DT del Manchester City buscará tener los primeros contactos con Messi para llevarlo a la Premier League

entry.title: Asumma 117m2 detached house

entry.content: Designed by the brilliant Christophe Aubertin of studiolada architects, the new Asumma 117m2 detached house is now available for production.

entry.title: India - China : సైనిక చర్యలకు సిద్ధం.. South China Sea లో భారీ యుద్ధ నౌకను మోహరించిన Bharat !

link.title: India - China : సైనిక చర్యలకు సిద్ధం.. South China Sea లో భారీ యుద్ధ నౌకను మోహరించిన Bharat !

entry.content:
ఓ వైపు శాంతి చర్చలంటూనే వాస్తవాధీన రేఖ(ఎల్ఏసీ) వెంట చైనా తన బలగాలను పూర్తిస్థాయిలో ఉపసంహరించుకోకుండా కవ్వింపు చర్యలకు పాల్పడుతున్నాయి. దీంతో భారత్ కూడా అందుకు తగినట్లుగానే వ్యవహరిస్తోంది. తాజాగా, సౌత్ చైనా సముద్రంలోకి ఓ భారీ భారత యుద్ధ నౌక ప్రవేశించింది.
#SouthChinaSea
#IndianNavy
#GalwanValley
#LadakhStandOff
#IndiaChinaborder
#BipinRawat
entry.summary: ఓ వైపు శాంతి చర్చలంటూనే వాస్తవాధీన రేఖ(ఎల్ఏసీ) వెంట చైనా తన బలగాలను పూర్తిస్థాయిలో ఉపసంహరించుకోకుండా కవ్వింపు చర్యలకు పాల్పడుతున్నాయి. దీంతో భారత్ కూడా అందుకు తగినట్లుగానే వ్యవహరిస్తోంది. తాజాగా, సౌత్ చైనా సముద్రంలోకి ఓ భారీ భారత యుద్ధ నౌక ప్రవేశించింది. #SouthChinaSea #IndianNavy #GalwanValley #LadakhStandOff #IndiaChinaborder #BipinRawat

entry.title: How To Download And Install Airtel Xstream App On TVs And Laptops

link.title: How To Download And Install Airtel Xstream App On TVs And Laptops

entry.content:
Reliance Jio’s cheap plans have forced other telcos to bring something new to attract customers. Similarly, Airtel has launched Xstream services to offer content in different languages, 350+live channels, and many more. The service is known as the Airtel Xstream application. It can be downloaded on Android TV, laptop, tablet, and smartphones.
► FOLLOW to Gizbot:
► Like us on Facebook:
► Follow us on Twitter:
► Follow us on Instagram:
► Subscribe Gizbot Youtube Channel:
► Follow us on Dailymotion:
"Music : www.bensound.com"
entry.summary: Reliance Jio’s cheap plans have forced other telcos to bring something new to attract customers. Similarly, Airtel has launched Xstream services to offer content in different languages, 350+live channels, and many more. The service is known as the Airtel Xstream application. It can be downloaded on Android TV, laptop, tablet, and smartphones. ► FOLLOW to Gizbot: ► Like us on Facebook: ► Follow us on Twitter: ► Follow us on Instagram: ► Subscribe Gizbot Youtube Channel: ► Follow us on Dailymotion: "Music : www.bensound.com"

entry.title: La météo pour ce jeudi 27 août 2020

link.title: La météo pour ce jeudi 27 août 2020

entry.content:
Les prévisions météo de BFMTV, du jeudi 27 août 2020, avec Christophe Person.
Les prévisions météo du moment. Par l’équipe météo de BFMTV: Christophe Person, Marc Hay, Sandra Larue et Guillaume Séchet.
BFMTV, 1ère chaîne d’information en continu de France, vous propose toute l’info en temps réel avec 18h d’antenne live par jour et des directs partout à travers le monde où l’actualité le nécessite. BFMTV, c’est aussi les débats et les grands reportages d’actualité. Retrouvez BFMTV sur le canal 15 de la TNT et sur BFMTV.com.
entry.summary: Les prévisions météo de BFMTV, du jeudi 27 août 2020, avec Christophe Person. Les prévisions météo du moment. Par l’équipe météo de BFMTV: Christophe Person, Marc Hay, Sandra Larue et Guillaume Séchet. BFMTV, 1ère chaîne d’information en continu de France, vous propose toute l’info en temps réel avec 18h d’antenne live par jour et des directs partout à travers le monde où l’actualité le nécessite. BFMTV, c’est aussi les débats et les grands reportages d’actualité. Retrouvez BFMTV sur le canal 15 de la TNT et sur BFMTV.com.

entry.title: Goaದಲ್ಲಿ20 ರುಪಾಯಿಗೆ ಸಿಗ್ತಿದೆ ಬಿಯರ್ Oneindia Kannada

link.title: Goaದಲ್ಲಿ20 ರುಪಾಯಿಗೆ ಸಿಗ್ತಿದೆ ಬಿಯರ್ Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
ಕೊರೊನಾ ಸೋಂಕು ಎಲ್ಲಾ ಕ್ಷೇತ್ರವನ್ನೂ ಹಾಳುಗೆಡವಿಬಿಟ್ಟಿದೆ. ವ್ಯಾಪಾರ- ವಹಿವಾಟುಗಳಿಲ್ಲದೇ ವ್ಯಾಪಾರಿ, ಉದ್ಯಮಿಗಳು ಕಂಗೆಟ್ಟಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಈ ನಡುವೆ ಪ್ರವಾಸೋದ್ಯಮಕ್ಕೆ ಹೆಸರುವಾಸಿಯಾಗಿರುವ ನೆರೆ ರಾಜ್ಯ ಗೋವಾದಲ್ಲಿ ವಿಧಿಸಿದ್ದ ಲಾಕ್‌ಡೌನ್‌ನಿಂದಾಗಿ ಪ್ರವಾಸಿಗರು ಬರದೇ ಮದ್ಯದ ವ್ಯಾಪಾರ ಪಾತಾಳಕ್ಕೆ ಇಳಿದಿದೆ.
#Goa #BEER
Goa companies are selling Beer for the lowest prices. But no good response due to the lack of tourists in goa.
entry.summary: ಕೊರೊನಾ ಸೋಂಕು ಎಲ್ಲಾ ಕ್ಷೇತ್ರವನ್ನೂ ಹಾಳುಗೆಡವಿಬಿಟ್ಟಿದೆ. ವ್ಯಾಪಾರ- ವಹಿವಾಟುಗಳಿಲ್ಲದೇ ವ್ಯಾಪಾರಿ, ಉದ್ಯಮಿಗಳು ಕಂಗೆಟ್ಟಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಈ ನಡುವೆ ಪ್ರವಾಸೋದ್ಯಮಕ್ಕೆ ಹೆಸರುವಾಸಿಯಾಗಿರುವ ನೆರೆ ರಾಜ್ಯ ಗೋವಾದಲ್ಲಿ ವಿಧಿಸಿದ್ದ ಲಾಕ್‌ಡೌನ್‌ನಿಂದಾಗಿ ಪ್ರವಾಸಿಗರು ಬರದೇ ಮದ್ಯದ ವ್ಯಾಪಾರ ಪಾತಾಳಕ್ಕೆ ಇಳಿದಿದೆ. #Goa #BEER Goa companies are selling Beer for the lowest prices. But no good response due to the lack of tourists in goa.

entry.title: Tráiler de Batman: Three Jokers, el cómic que quiere poner el mundo del Caballero Oscuro patas arriba

link.title: Tráiler de Batman: Three Jokers, el cómic que quiere poner el mundo del Caballero Oscuro patas arriba

entry.content: Tráiler de Batman: Three Jokers, el nuevo cómic de DC que supondrá todo un cambio en la historia del Caballero Oscuro, poniendo su mundo patas arriba.
entry.summary: Tráiler de Batman: Three Jokers, el nuevo cómic de DC que supondrá todo un cambio en la historia del Caballero Oscuro, poniendo su mundo patas arriba.

entry.title: Holiday activities for the kids at JCube!

link.title: Holiday activities for the kids at JCube!

entry.content:
Full story: www.asiaone.com/lifestyle/bored-no-more-fun-classes-and-activities-kids-jcube-including-free-trials-september/
Timo (@timothursday) and his niece Hannah are back! This time, we got to host the two of them as they explored what JCube has to offer — ice-skating, dancing, pottery and tons more exciting activities for the kids!
#Holidays #Fun #School
entry.summary: Full story: www.asiaone.com/lifestyle/bored-no-more-fun-classes-and-activities-kids-jcube-including-free-trials-september/ Timo (@timothursday) and his niece Hannah are back! This time, we got to host the two of them as they explored what JCube has to offer — ice-skating, dancing, pottery and tons more exciting activities for the kids! #Holidays #Fun #School

entry.title: Dekat rumah pun boleh buat duit, tapi kena tahu cara nak kekal produktif

link.title: Dekat rumah pun boleh buat duit, tapi kena tahu cara nak kekal produktif

entry.content:
TAK kisahlah sama ada bekerja sendiri atau makan gaji, pokok pangkalnya kena tahu cara nak tingkatkan produktiviti ketika di rumah.
Ikuti beberapa tip ringkas supaya anda kekal produktif.
entry.summary: TAK kisahlah sama ada bekerja sendiri atau makan gaji, pokok pangkalnya kena tahu cara nak tingkatkan produktiviti ketika di rumah. Ikuti beberapa tip ringkas supaya anda kekal produktif.

entry.title: Charlie Hebdo’s ‘blasphemous’ cartoons to be republished, here’s why Oneindia News

link.title: Charlie Hebdo’s ‘blasphemous’ cartoons to be republished, here’s why Oneindia News

entry.content:
French satirical magazine Charlie Hebdo has decided to republish cartoons featuring the Islamic Prophet Mohammed this week ahead of trials of 14 alleged accomplices who aided the attackers who killed journalists associated with the publication in 2015. Why has Charlie Hebdo chosen this time to republish the controversial cartoons?
#CharlieHebdo #JeSuisCharlie #Blasphemy
entry.summary: French satirical magazine Charlie Hebdo has decided to republish cartoons featuring the Islamic Prophet Mohammed this week ahead of trials of 14 alleged accomplices who aided the attackers who killed journalists associated with the publication in 2015. Why has Charlie Hebdo chosen this time to republish the controversial cartoons? #CharlieHebdo #JeSuisCharlie #Blasphemy

entry.title: Masque : certaines professions bénéficieront d’exceptions

link.title: Masque : certaines professions bénéficieront d’exceptions

entry.content:
Le port du masque sera obligatoire en entreprise à compter du mardi 1er septembre. Certains métiers bénéficieront de dérogations, notamment ceux nécessitant d’importants efforts physiques.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Le port du masque sera obligatoire en entreprise à compter du mardi 1er septembre. Certains métiers bénéficieront de dérogations, notamment ceux nécessitant d’importants efforts physiques. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: [INDO SUB] NCT OSHIETE JAPAN! EP 5 LESSON 2

link.title: [INDO SUB] NCT OSHIETE JAPAN! EP 5 LESSON 2

entry.content:
Everything belongs to NCT 127, I just translated it into Indonesian.
ENGSUB from : Neo Subs For NCT
INDO SUB by : @Sweetyzen_
Ini salah satu variety show NCT 127 yang wajib ditonton. Aku translate ini karena belum ada sub indo nya. Jadi maaf jika ada kalimat yang salah atau tidak dimengerti. Keep support NCT & WayV!

entry.title: ENG vs PAK 3rd Test, Rain-ruined draw; England claim series Oneindia Tamil

link.title: ENG vs PAK 3rd Test, Rain-ruined draw; England claim series Oneindia Tamil

entry.content:
#engvspak
#jamesanderson
ENG vs PAK : England vs Pakistan 3rd test match result - Pakistan drawn the third test with the help of Rain and feeling better despite losing the series 0 - 1 to England.
இங்கிலாந்து - பாகிஸ்தான் அணிகள் இடையே ஆன மூன்றாவது டெஸ்ட் போட்டி டிரா ஆனது.
entry.summary: #engvspak #jamesanderson ENG vs PAK : England vs Pakistan 3rd test match result - Pakistan drawn the third test with the help of Rain and feeling better despite losing the series 0 - 1 to England. இங்கிலாந்து - பாகிஸ்தான் அணிகள் இடையே ஆன மூன்றாவது டெஸ்ட் போட்டி டிரா ஆனது.

entry.title: Be mindful of your words, Rais Yatim reminds Senate

link.title: Be mindful of your words, Rais Yatim reminds Senate

entry.content:
In his inaugural address as president of the Senate, Tan Sri Dr Rais Yatim told members of the Senate to be polite every time they speak and debate despite having differences of opinion as they were being watched by the people and would be an example, especially to the young.
WATCH MORE:
SUBSCRIBE:
LIKE:
entry.summary: In his inaugural address as president of the Senate, Tan Sri Dr Rais Yatim told members of the Senate to be polite every time they speak and debate despite having differences of opinion as they were being watched by the people and would be an example, especially to the young. WATCH MORE: SUBSCRIBE: LIKE:

entry.title: BJP विधायक शशांक त्रिवेदी ने बीच मीटिंग में महिला सांसद को कहा ‘भौजाई’, फिर मिला ये जवाब

link.title: BJP विधायक शशांक त्रिवेदी ने बीच मीटिंग में महिला सांसद को कहा ‘भौजाई’, फिर मिला ये जवाब

entry.content: सीतापुर। महोली सीट से बीजेपी विधायक शशांक त्रिवेदी क्षेत्र पंचायतों की वार्षीक बैठक के दौरान अपनी मर्यादा भूल गए। वो धौरहरा की सांसद रेखा वर्मा को मीटिंग के बीच में बड़े ही शायराना अंदाज में भौजाई बोल गए। जिसके बाद सांसद रेखा वर्मा ने विधायक शशांक त्रिवेदी को मर्यादा का पाठ पढ़ाया और कहा कि ‘मैं आपकी भौजाई नहीं बड़ी बहन हूं।’ दोनों के बीच शायराना नोकझोंक से बैठक में गर्मा-गर्मी का माहौल बन गया।
entry.summary: सीतापुर। महोली सीट से बीजेपी विधायक शशांक त्रिवेदी क्षेत्र पंचायतों की वार्षीक बैठक के दौरान अपनी मर्यादा भूल गए। वो धौरहरा की सांसद रेखा वर्मा को मीटिंग के बीच में बड़े ही शायराना अंदाज में भौजाई बोल गए। जिसके बाद सांसद रेखा वर्मा ने विधायक शशांक त्रिवेदी को मर्यादा का पाठ पढ़ाया और कहा कि ‘मैं आपकी भौजाई नहीं बड़ी बहन हूं।’ दोनों के बीच शायराना नोकझोंक से बैठक में गर्मा-गर्मी का माहौल बन गया।

entry.title: Hadi on Khairuddin’s Covid-19 quarantine breach: Morals come first in PAS

link.title: Hadi on Khairuddin’s Covid-19 quarantine breach: Morals come first in PAS

entry.content:
PAS president Datuk Seri Abdul Hadi Awang told the press on Tuesday that his party prioritises morals and religious laws first.
He added that if any party member had violated these tenets, then he or she would be sacked from the party.
WATCH MORE:
SUBSCRIBE:
LIKE:
entry.summary: PAS president Datuk Seri Abdul Hadi Awang told the press on Tuesday that his party prioritises morals and religious laws first. He added that if any party member had violated these tenets, then he or she would be sacked from the party. WATCH MORE: SUBSCRIBE: LIKE:

entry.title: [INDO SUB] NCT OSHIETE JAPAN! EP 1 LESSON 2

link.title: [INDO SUB] NCT OSHIETE JAPAN! EP 1 LESSON 2

entry.content:
Everything belongs to NCT 127, I just translated it into Indonesian.
ENGSUB from : Neo Subs For NCT
INDO SUB by : @Sweetyzen_
Ini salah satu variety show NCT 127 yang wajib ditonton. Aku translate ini karena belum ada sub indo nya. Jadi maaf jika ada kalimat yang salah atau tidak dimengerti. Keep support NCT & WayV!
entry.summary: Everything belongs to NCT 127, I just translated it into Indonesian. ENGSUB from : Neo Subs For NCT INDO SUB by : @Sweetyzen_ Ini salah satu variety show NCT 127 yang wajib ditonton. Aku translate ini karena belum ada sub indo nya. Jadi maaf jika ada kalimat yang salah atau tidak dimengerti. Keep support NCT & WayV!
